title: go-cli command specification
description: Declarative specification of a cobra command hierarchy consumed by the go-cli library.

issue-url.description: URL users are directed to for filing bugs, propagated to every command in the hierarchy.

app-id.description: Identifier used to scope the application's on-disk storage (config, cache, data, runtime). When omitted, it is derived from the first token of `use`, then the running binary's name.

id.description: Unique identifier used to bind a runner to this command.

aliases.description: Alternative names the command can be invoked by.

examples.description: Example invocations shown in help output.

summary.description: Short, one-line description of the command.

hidden.description: Whether the command is hidden from help output.

deprecated.description: Deprecation message shown when the command is used. A non-empty value marks the command deprecated.

issue-url.description: Only meaningful on the root command, which propagates it to the whole hierarchy. Ignored elsewhere.

app-id.description: Only meaningful on the root command. Ignored elsewhere.

groupCommands.description: Named groups of subcommands. The reserved group "default" holds commands that belong to no group; any other key names a titled group.
